name: codex-pro
description: Advanced Codex integration for Claude Code — drop-in upgrade for openai/codex-plugin-cc with ensemble pattern, hard timeouts, circuit breaker, and structured observability. v0.2: adds /codex-pro:review v0.1, /codex-pro:rescue v0.1.1, and /codex-pro:adversarial-review v0.1 to the v0.1 setup + batch baseline.
